mapper.select: SELECT id, report_blur_threshold, post_rate_window_seconds, post_rate_max, comment_rate_window_seconds, comment_rate_max, inquiry_rate_window_seconds, inquiry_rate_max FROM ai_moderation_setting WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_moderation_setting SET report_blur_threshold = #{reportBlurThreshold}, post_rate_window_seconds = #{postRateWindowSeconds}, post_rate_max = #{postRateMax}, comment_rate_window_seconds = #{commentRateWindowSeconds}, comment_rate_max = #{commentRateMax}, inquiry_rate_window_seconds = #{inquiryRateWindowSeconds}, inquiry_rate_max = #{inquiryRateMax} WHERE id = #{id}
